issues.title: [AURORA P0] Homepage content renders intermittently invisible (reveal race w/ Jetpack Boost)
issues.body:
## Problem

On the live homepage, the hero copy and below-the-fold sections frequently render at `opacity:0` (black/empty hero) on cache-cold loads. GSAP loads fine (`gsapDefined:true`); the cause is a race condition: CSS hides `[data-reveal]` elements at `opacity:0` and Jetpack Boost defers the reveal JS (`hasJpDeferAttr:true`), so the reveal never fires in time (sometimes never on scroll).

## Impact

- **CRITICAL** - First impression on the live homepage is a broken/empty hero
- Intermittent (cache-dependent), so it's easy to miss but hits real visitors
- Affects every `[data-reveal]` element site-wide, incl. `/blog/`

## Recommended fix

- Make reveal progressive: content visible by default; only hide+animate when JS confirms it ran (in `assets/js/micro-interactions.js` and the inline reveal CSS)
- And/or exclude `theme.js`, `micro-interactions.js`, `aurora-animations.js` from Jetpack Boost "Defer JS / Concatenate JS"
- Regenerate Jetpack Boost Critical CSS after

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Hard-reload `/` 5x cache-cold: hero copy + all sections visible every time
- [ ] No `[data-reveal]` element stuck at opacity:0 with JS disabled
- [ ] Reduced-motion still shows content immediately
- [ ] Verified on desktop + mobile

issues.title: [AURORA P0] /blog/ renders the homepage clone instead of a post archive
issues.body:
## Problem

`/blog/` (the WordPress Posts page) shows the marketing homepage hero, not a list of articles. `templates/home.html` is a duplicate of `templates/front-page.html`, and WordPress uses `home.html` for the Posts page.

## Impact

- **CRITICAL** - The blog/Writing destination is effectively missing; no articles listed
- Inherits the P0 invisible-hero bug
- Hurts SEO (post archive not crawlable as expected)

## Recommended fix

Rebuild `templates/home.html` as a real post archive. The card layout in `templates/index.html` already exists — base `home.html` on it (query loop + pagination). Keep `front-page.html` as the static front page.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `/blog/` lists recent posts with excerpts/dates/categories
- [ ] Pagination works
- [ ] Post cards link to single posts
- [ ] Mobile responsive

issues.title: [AURORA P1] Generic page template prints a duplicate title (two H1s)
issues.body:
## Problem

`templates/page.html` outputs the WP page title H1 above the page content, but content blocks already include their own hero heading — producing a duplicate title (clearly visible on `/about/`). Affects every page using the generic template.

## Impact

- **MEDIUM/HIGH** - Duplicate H1 hurts SEO and looks broken
- Affects the whole long tail of content pages

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Exactly one H1 per page
- [ ] `/about/` no longer shows "About Kris Krüg" twice
- [ ] Fix in `templates/page.html` (drop the title block) or give key pages custom templates
- [ ] No regression on pages that rely on the auto title

issues.title: [AURORA P1] Broken hotlinked image (Upgrade AI 400) + migrate proof images into media library
issues.body:
## Problem

All hero/proof images are hotlinked from external sites. `theupgrade.ai` share image returns **HTTP 400**, producing a black card on the Work page and homepage. The rest are fragile (one already dead) and lack rights/alt governance.

## Impact

- **HIGH** - Broken/black image cards on key conversion pages
- Any source-site path change breaks kriskrug.co imagery

## Recommended fix

Per `docs/current-state/AURORA-MEDIA-GAPS-2026-05-23.md`: upload canonical assets into the kriskrug.co media library, rewrite `src`/`srcset` in `templates/front-page.html`, `parts/work-proof-grid.html`, `parts/speaking-proof-grid.html`; set alt text + confirm rights.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Every proof/hero image served 200 from kriskrug.co media library (no external hotlinks)
- [ ] Upgrade AI card image displays
- [ ] All images have descriptive alt text
- [ ] michelle-diamond/195 no longer reused 4x (distinct images)

issues.title: [AURORA P1] Both Hands Full proof card has text/image overlap
issues.body:
## Problem

On the Work page proof grid, the Both Hands Full card's image (og-image, loads 200) overlaps the card title/caption text.

## Impact

- **MEDIUM** - Looks broken on a key page

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Image and caption/title no longer overlap
- [ ] Card layout consistent with the other proof cards
- [ ] Fix in `parts/work-proof-grid.html` / associated CSS
- [ ] Verified desktop + mobile

issues.title: [AURORA P1] Low-contrast body text fails WCAG AA
issues.body:
## Problem

Dek/body paragraphs (About, Services, Speaking) render as dim grey on near-black, below the 4.5:1 WCAG 2.1 AA threshold.

## Impact

- **MEDIUM/HIGH** - Accessibility violation; poor readability

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All body text ≥ 4.5:1 contrast (validate with axe/WAVE)
- [ ] Large text ≥ 3:1
- [ ] Adjust `text-secondary`/dek token in `theme.json` or CSS
- [ ] No design regression

issues.title: [AURORA P1] ~25 generic content pages are undesigned (bare title + legacy content)
issues.body:
## Problem

Services, marketing offer pages, authority pages, and multilingual intro pages render as bare WP title + legacy content on Aurora base styles — awkward spacing, old structure, no Aurora treatment (e.g. `/generative-ai-services/`).

## Impact

- **MEDIUM** - Large band of pages look unfinished post-launch

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Define an approach: improved generic `page` template and/or custom templates for high-value pages
- [ ] Services page redesigned (tracked separately)
- [ ] Consistent spacing/hero treatment across content pages
- [ ] Prioritized list of which pages get bespoke treatment vs. template polish

issues.title: [AURORA P2] Contact page intro drop-cap glitch (giant 'P')
issues.body:
## Problem

The Contact page intro renders a giant drop-cap "P" on "Pls fill out the form below..." — legacy first-letter styling clashing with Aurora.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Intro paragraph renders normally (no giant first letter)
- [ ] Fix in page content or CSS
- [ ] Jetpack contact form still renders/works

issues.title: [AURORA P2] 'Work' nav link 301-hops via /work/; point directly + remove duplicate template
issues.body:
## Problem

The header "Work" link points to `/work/`, which 301-redirects to `/recent-projects-include/` (extra hop). Also `templates/page-2672.html` is a redundant duplicate of `templates/page-recent-projects-include.html` (both target the Work page).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] "Work" nav links directly to the canonical Work URL (no redirect hop)
- [ ] Remove the redundant `page-2672.html` template
- [ ] Work page still renders correctly

issues.title: [AURORA P2] Performance + Jetpack Boost Critical CSS regeneration
issues.body:
## Problem

Homepage cold load ~4.3s. Heavy JS payload + GSAP from CDN. Jetpack Boost Critical CSS was cleared by the theme change and needs regeneration.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Regenerate Jetpack Boost Critical CSS
- [ ] Run Lighthouse; record LCP/INP/CLS
- [ ] Consider self-hosting GSAP + trimming unused JS
- [ ] Homepage LCP within target on cold load

issues.title: [AURORA P2] Work page OG image is blank
issues.body:
## Problem

`/recent-projects-include/` (Work) returns `og:image` = `https://s0.wp.com/i/blank.jpg` — no social share image.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Work page has a real, relevant og:image
- [ ] Validated in a social-share debugger

issues.title: [AURORA P2] Dedicated mobile / responsive QA pass
issues.body:
## Problem

Mobile rendering could not be reliably captured during the launch audit. Needs a dedicated device/breakpoint review.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Mobile nav collapses to a working hamburger menu (open/close, focus trap, Escape)
- [ ] Hero image crop/scale acceptable on small screens
- [ ] Proof/work grids stack correctly
- [ ] No horizontal overflow
- [ ] Tested at 360/390/768 widths
